seoTitle: Bonnie Rock vs Bonniefield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Bonnie Rock vs Bonniefield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bonnie Rock and Bonniefield.
heading: Bonnie Rock vs Bonniefield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bonnie Rock, Western Australia and Bonniefield, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bonniefield has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Bonnie Rock (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bonnie Rock or Bonniefield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bonnie Rock has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Bonniefield scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bonnie Rock scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Bonniefield scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bonnie Rock or Bonniefield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bonniefield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
